revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23362124453|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Myanmar%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Rather than redirecting {{tl|Country data Burma}} to {{tl|Country data Myanmar}}, the former template transcludes the latter and passes through all parameters. The linked article will always be "Myanmar", but the displayed name is either "Burma" or "Myanmar" based on which of the two templates is used, even in templates that usually have a fixed default display name (such as {{tl|flag country}} and {{tl|fb}}). This allows for "Burma" to be used in historical contexts without having to also set {{para|name}}. The variants from {{tl|Country data Myanmar}} can be used with both templates. ====Examples==== {|class="wikitable" ! Template !! Myanmar output !! Burma output |- | {{tlx|flag|MYA}} || {{flag|Myanmar}} || {{flag|Burma}} |- | {{tlx|flag|MYA|1974}} || {{flag|Myanmar|1974}} || {{flag|Burma|1974}} |- | {{tlx|flag country|MYA}} || {{flag country|Myanmar}} || {{flag country|Burma}} |- | {{tlx|flag icon|MYA}} || {{flag icon|Myanmar}} || {{flag icon|Burma}} |- | {{tlx|bb|MYA}} || {{bb|Myanmar}} || {{bb|Burma}} |- | {{tlx|fb|MYA}} || {{fb|Myanmar}} || {{fb|Burma}} |} ====Redirects to Template:Country data Myanmar==== * {{noredirect|Template:Country data MM}} * {{noredirect|Template:Country data MMR}} * {{noredirect|Template:Country data MYA}} ====Redirects to Template:Country data Burma==== * {{noredirect|Template:Country data BIR}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Country data templates of countries|Myanmar]] [[Category:Country data templates of Myanmar| ]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
